title: Dexter Phase 2 — Personality + AI Design Spec
summary: Technical design spec for Dexter Phase 2: Gemini AI chat, image generation, personality/mood system, auto-queue, rate limiter, and supporting infrastructure.
notes: Path under /specs/ plus content signals (component designs, method signatures, data models, config and DB query contracts) confirm SPEC. A 'Decisions Made' table introduces ADR-like signal, but it is a summary of design choices within a broader implementation spec rather than per-decision ADRs, so SPEC dominates.
